title: isoloma walkerae
intro: Isoloma walkerae, also known as the walking fern or walking tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. This plant is native to the tropical forests of the Philippines and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. Isoloma walkerae is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues such as fever, cough, and skin infections. The plant can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its leaves can also be crushed and applied topically to aid in wound healing and skin conditions.
